titleStmt.title: SII 7.177: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 177. (A.R. No. 17 of 1901). ON A PILLARAt the top areliṅga on a pedestal.IN FRONT OF THE DESERTED TEMPLE OF GOLLARA-GANAPATI AT MANGALORE, MANGALORE TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
The line begins with the figure of a chakra.svasti . śrīmatu pāṁḍyacakrava¨rtti rāyagajāṁkuśa baṁki
dēvāḷupēṁdradēvara vijayarājya muttarōtta rābhivriddhi prava
¨rddhamāna mācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapratipāḷa
karāgi sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttami¨rdda śakābda
1225 neya śubhakṛtsaṁvatsarada mēṣamāsa 7 neya . Ā .
śrīmatu rājadhāni maṁgaḷāpuradaramaneya mogasāle
yallōlagaṁgoṭṭiralu . muṁna taṁmaḍiyakka mōcalamahā
dēviyaru sva¨rggastarādavara piṁḍapradānadalu nīra dēvālya
dalu brahmāviṣṇumahēśvara¨rgge vāmanana kayyalu dhāre Erada
12 ḍu . Akkiya vupārakke Ā dina kaṁṇūra haravayyalu kaṭiva
ṭṭameṁba kaḷabhūmi bidekāru mū 12 nū 12 kuḍiteyakki
ya nivēdyakke Ā bhūmiya sidhdhāyavanū kādu vāmanasēnabhaṁgevū
Ātana santānakkevū kūḍe Ā nivēdyava naḍisikoṁḍu bāḷuvudeṁ
du dhāreya neṟadu koṭṭaru . Ī dha¨rmmava nānūbba nahudalleṁdaḍe
vāraṇāśiyalu sāvira kavileya koṁda brahmetti . na¨rmmadeyalu sāvi
ra brāhmaṇaghātava māḍida brahmetti . sthānadoḷagāva nānobba nahudalleṁ
daḍe sthānadiṁde hoṟage . [A]rasige tappu teṟuva ga 51 kaṁṇukai śinti
Endu barada śilāsaṁkētamaṁ kēḷda śrīmadarsa¨rgge maṁgaḷa mahāśrī .
Digital edition of SII 7.177 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
